title: Chinese firms market Iran war intelligence ‘exposing’ U.S. forces
summary_full: Private Chinese technology companies — some with ties to the military — are marketing detailed intelligence on movements of U.S. forces in Iran, even as Beijing seeks to keep its distance.
summary_public: Private Chinese technology companies — some with ties to the military — are marketing detailed intelligence on movements of U.S. forces in Iran, even as Beijing seeks to keep its distance.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: movements of U.S. forces in Iran
